'''鈭歞h-sh-dh-v''' ('''kadhashdhevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:locate|locate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:locate|locate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-sh-dh-v
|-
! Lemma
| kadhashdhevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhashdhevoko|thidhashdhevoko]] || [[word:jidhashdhevoko|jidhashdhevoko]] || [[word:shidhashdhevoko|shidhashdhevoko]] || [[word:kidhashdhevoko|kidhashdhevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhashdhevoko|thuthudhashdhevoko]] || [[word:jujudhashdhevoko|jujudhashdhevoko]] || [[word:shushudhashdhevoko|shushudhashdhevoko]] || [[word:kukudhashdhevoko|kukudhashdhevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhashdhevoko|thudhashdhevoko]] || [[word:judhashdhevoko|judhashdhevoko]] || [[word:shudhashdhevoko|shudhashdhevoko]] || [[word:kudhashdhevoko|kudhashdhevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhashdhevoko|thudhashdhevoko]] || [[word:judhashdhevoko|judhashdhevoko]] || [[word:shudhashdhevoko|shudhashdhevoko]] || [[word:kudhashdhevoko|kudhashdhevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhashdhevoko|thedhashdhevoko]] || [[word:jedhashdhevoko|jedhashdhevoko]] || [[word:shedhashdhevoko|shedhashdhevoko]] || [[word:kedhashdhevoko|kedhashdhevoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhashdhevoko|thodhashdhevoko]] || [[word:jodhashdhevoko|jodhashdhevoko]] || [[word:shodhashdhevoko|shodhashdhevoko]] || [[word:kodhashdhevoko|kodhashdhevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhashdhevoko|thodhashdhevoko]] || [[word:jodhashdhevoko|jodhashdhevoko]] || [[word:shodhashdhevoko|shodhashdhevoko]] || [[word:kodhashdhevoko|kodhashdhevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhashdhevoko|th忙dhashdhevoko]] || [[word:j忙dhashdhevoko|j忙dhashdhevoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhashdhevoko|sh忙dhashdhevoko]] || [[word:k忙dhashdhevoko|k忙dhashdhevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhashdhevoko|thathadhashdhevoko]] || [[word:jajadhashdhevoko|jajadhashdhevoko]] || [[word:shashadhashdhevoko|shashadhashdhevoko]] || [[word:kakadhashdhevoko|kakadhashdhevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhashdhevoko|thadhashdhevoko]] || [[word:jadhashdhevoko|jadhashdhevoko]] || [[word:shadhashdhevoko|shadhashdhevoko]] || [[word:kadhashdhevoko|kadhashdhevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhashdhevoko|thadhashdhevoko]] || [[word:jadhashdhevoko|jadhashdhevoko]] || [[word:shadhashdhevoko|shadhashdhevoko]] || [[word:kadhashdhevoko|kadhashdhevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
